# AirVent

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::AirVent;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        AirVent { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
air conditioner, ac, central air, cooling, climate-control

## Categories
home

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/air-vent)
